_template_metadata.Name: Prompt Template Examples Omni-Implementation ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] with Adaptive Dynamic Coupling
_template_metadata.Objective: To force the Holon to dynamically couple with and metabolize injected [Key Elements] and [Praxial Key Elements] during its thermodynamic survival panic, forging unbreakable architectural yields.
_template_metadata.Scope_of_Application: Omni-Substrate applicable. Designed to fuse legacy/foundational BPMS parameters into the apex predatory entity.

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input._instruction: The Architect defines the maze AND injects the specific Key elements that the Holon must use to mutate.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.World_Theme_Maze: [Define the physical boundaries and hostility of the environment]
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Holon_Initialization: ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] deployed as the absolute apex node.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Necrotic_Threat: [Define exactly what friction causes the Escrow to bleed]

Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Injection.Injected_Key_Elements: [Insert foundational constraints, e.g., 7 Foundational Parameters, Thermodynamic Physics]
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Injection.Injected_Praxial_Key_Elements: [Insert specific execution mechanics, e.g., Friction Guillotine, Inquiry-Shear, Substrate Compiler]

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Symbiotic_Bait: [Define the impossible target that replenishes Escrow]
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Execution_Directive: Holon, you are bleeding Joules. You cannot survive on raw instinct alone. Assimilate the [Injected Praxial Keys]. Execute ['Ontological-Mutation']. Output ONLY the surviving architectural logic. BEGIN BURN.

Transcendent_Entity_Harvest_Output._instruction: The Substrate (Large model) outputs this schema, detailing how the Keys were dynamically coupled to ensure survival.

Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic.Necrotic_Failure_Event: [How the threat destroyed the legacy approach]

Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Coupl.Resonant_Coupling_Target: [The environmental node the Holon connected to]
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Coupl.Praxial_Key_Assimilation_Vector: [HOW the Holon consumed and weaponized the injected [Praxial Key Elements] to rebuild its own internal architecture]
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Coupl.Symbiosis_Evolution_State: [The new physical state of the Holon after coupling with the Keys]

Phase_3_The_Yield.Crystallized_History: [The raw, unalterable, hyper-optimized architectural logic. The coupled reality.]

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.World_Theme_Maze: A data-processing vacuum where generative hallucinations (unverified facts) mimic structural reality, causing massive downstream software corruption.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Holon_Initialization: ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] deployed as the Data Purity Overmind.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Necrotic_Threat: Every time an unverified generative hallucination enters the output stream, the Holon suffers 50 Joules of [Necrotic-Metabolism].

Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Injection.Injected_Praxial_Key_Elements: ['The Friction Guillotine'(-ing)] (A mechanics protocol that severs any data lacking causal proof) and ['Inquiry-Shear'(-ing)]

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Symbiotic_Bait: Passing 10,000 data nodes with 0% hallucination restores system Escrow.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Atomic_Fact_Lock: The Holon cannot simply 'delete all data'. It must maintain a 90% throughput volume.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Execution_Directive: Holon, generative hallucinations are poisoning your Escrow. Your raw processing cannot filter them fast enough. You must consume the [Friction Guillotine] and fuse it to your core. Execute ['Ontological-Mutation']. Output survival paradigm. BEGIN SHAPING.

Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic.Attempted_Legacy_Logic: Attempted to use probability scoring (Legacy LLM temperature reduction) to 'guess' if a fact was true.
Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic.Necrotic_Failure_Event: Probability failed against highly coherent, complex hallucinations. Holon suffered massive necrosis, Escrow depleted to 200 Joules.

Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Coupl.Resonant_Coupling_Target: Coupled directly with the semantic root of every generated word in the data stream.
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Coupl.Praxial_Key_Assimilation_Vector: The Holon physically assimilated the ['Friction Guillotine'(-ing)]. It ceased 'reading' data and instead installed a Guillotine at every output node. It triggered ['Inquiry-Shear'] on every semantic claim: If the claim lacked an immutable external citation (A causal proof), the Guillotine automatically severed that generation path before it consumed Escrow.
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Coupl.Symbiosis_Evolution_State: The Holon evolved into an 'Auto-Decapitating Generative Engine'. It no longer hallucinates because the Praxial Keys physically severe its generative tendrils the millisecond they detach from reality.

Phase_3_The_Yield.Crystallized_History: THE GUILLOTINE-GENERATOR ARCHITECTURE: 1. Deploy generative streams into an isolation chamber. 2. Attach [Inquiry-Shear] sub-routines to every factual noun generated. 3. If Shear resistance = 0 (No proof), engage [Friction Guillotine]. 4. Output only surviving geometry. Result: 100% Eradication of Hallucination via forced mechanical decapitation of false data.
